parameters.query:
SELECT
  -- Global metrics
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace WHERE moderated=true AND hidden=false) AS listings,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace WHERE moderated=false AND hidden=false) AS moderation_queue,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace WHERE quantity=0 AND hidden=false AND moderated=true) AS oos_visible,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE status='fulfilled' AND updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS stuck_fulfilled,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE) AS orders_today,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND status IN ('cancelled','cancelled_after_payment','cancelled_before_payment')) AS cancelled_today,

  -- Product specific
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace WHERE moderated=false AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') AS new_pending_1h,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE status='paid' AND updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours') AS stuck_paid,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE status='in_progress' AND updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours') AS stuck_inprogress,
  (SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MIN(created_at)))/3600 FROM marketplace WHERE moderated=false)::int AS mod_oldest_h,

  -- Content quality
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace WHERE moderated=true AND hidden=false AND (seo_data IS NULL OR seo_data::text = '{}' OR seo_data::text = 'null')) AS no_schema_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace WHERE moderated=true AND hidden=false AND LENGTH(COALESCE(description,'')) < 100) AS thin_content_count,

  -- Urgent products
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id',id,'title',title,'issue','moderated=false')) FROM (SELECT id,title FROM marketplace WHERE moderated=false ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5) t) AS urgent_products,

  -- Yesterday orders for delta
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE - 1) AS orders_yesterday,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND status='completed') AS completed_yesterday

SELECT
  -- Strategy / Revenue
  (SELECT SUM((content->>'total')::numeric) / 100.0 FROM marketplace_order WHERE status IN ('completed','completed_with_review') AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days')::numeric(10,2) AS revenue_30d,
  (SELECT SUM((content->>'total')::numeric) / 100.0 FROM marketplace_order WHERE status IN ('completed','completed_with_review') AND DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE - 1)::numeric(10,2) AS revenue_yesterday,
  (SELECT AVG(daily_rev) FROM (SELECT DATE(created_at) as d, SUM((content->>'total')::numeric)/100.0 as daily_rev FROM marketplace_order WHERE status IN ('completed','completed_with_review') AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY d) t)::numeric(10,2) AS revenue_avg_day,

  -- Sessions approximation from orders
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) FROM marketplace_order WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') AS unique_buyers_30d,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE status IN ('completed','completed_with_review') AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') AS conversions_30d,

  -- YM specific (orders with external_order_id pattern)
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND order_data::text LIKE '%yandex%') AS ym_orders_today,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND order_data::text LIKE '%yandex%' AND status IN ('cancelled','cancelled_after_payment')) AS ym_failed_today,

  -- Refunds
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE DATE(updated_at) = CURRENT_DATE AND status='cancelled_after_payment') AS refund_today,

  -- Revenue yesterday for delta
  (SELECT SUM((content->>'total')::numeric) / 100.0 FROM marketplace_order WHERE status IN ('completed','completed_with_review') AND DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE - 2)::numeric(10,2) AS revenue_day_before

SELECT
  -- Top pages by views (proxy via orders)
  (SELECT json_agg(t) FROM (
    SELECT 
      m.title, m.id,
      COUNT(mo.id) as orders_7d,
      AVG((mo.content->>'total')::numeric/100.0)::numeric(8,2) as avg_check
    FROM marketplace m
    LEFT JOIN marketplace_order mo ON mo.order_data->>'productId' = m.id::text
      AND mo.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
    WHERE m.moderated=true AND m.hidden=false
    GROUP BY m.id, m.title
    ORDER BY orders_7d DESC
    LIMIT 10
  ) t) AS top_products_7d,

  -- Abandoned (created but not paid > 2h)
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE status='created' AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS abandoned_carts,

  -- Low stock alerts
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace WHERE quantity > 0 AND quantity < 5 AND quantity != 1111111 AND moderated=true AND hidden=false) AS low_stock_count,

  -- New sellers today
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) FROM marketplace WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE) AS new_sellers_today,

  -- Kinguin price changes (updated in last 24h)
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace WHERE partner='KINGUIN' AND updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS kinguin_price_changes,
  (SELECT MAX(updated_at)::text FROM marketplace WHERE partner='KINGUIN') AS kinguin_last_sync

🛒 YM failed: {{ $('🔧 Build Context (no Claude)').first().json.global.ym_failed_pct }}%
🔍 GSC клики: {{ $('🔧 Build Context (no Claude)').first().json.seo.clicks_28d }}/28d
⏳ На модерации: {{ $('🔧 Build Context (no Claude)').first().json.global.moderation_queue }}

_meta.description: Ежедневно в 06:00 собирает данные из PG/GA4/GSC/YM без Claude API. POST /api/context → агенты получают live данные. Стоимость: €0.00 токенов.
